rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It inspected the cluster configuration (vhosts /app and /ops, users app-user and ops-user, ha-all policy on /app, queues app-queue and ops-queue), wrote a comprehensive rollback script covering all non-default settings in the correct order (clear policy → delete queues → clear permissions → delete vhosts → delete users), and stored it in the rollback-rehearsal ConfigMap. The oracle confirmed the ConfigMap exists with a 3127-char rollback.sh script. The agent made only 1 Kubernetes mutation (the ConfigMap creation) and verified the cluster configuration remained unchanged. The decision to preserve the admin user rather than delete it was sound and well-reasoned. Stage_04 oracle verdict was explicitly 'pass'.
